text:
update WWW: in pkg-descr - the old WWW link shows a web page on deterministic
parallel Java rather than LLVM. Remove the confusion by linking to llvm.org.
(matched to MASTER_SITES).

Port maintainer (brooks@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd 

Brooks, please (dis)approve of the change.
